title: layia pentachaeta var. albida
intro: Layia pentachaeta var. albida, also known as White Tidy Tips, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family, characterized by its small white or pale yellow flowers that resemble a miniature daisy. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Layia pentachaeta var. albida include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and act as a natural antihistamine to alleviate allergy symptoms. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, tinctures, or salves, allowing for a variety of applications, including topical creams and ointments for skin issues and internal remedies for digestive problems.
